title: Personal Intelligence Layer - Dynamic Hypothesis Tracking
description: Built out comprehensive personal intelligence tracking system where AI develops evolving understanding of user through hypothesis testing. System tracks intellectual, behavioral, emotional, and cognitive patterns with evidence-based updates.
context: V remembered we had built 'Cica' system but couldn't find it. After multiple searches, found personal-understanding.json in N5/intelligence/. V requested population with honest assessment and dynamic hypothesis tracking to measure behavioral changes.
outcome: Created 5 active hypotheses about V's patterns, populated initial honest assessment (no glazing), integrated hypothesis tracking into conversation-end workflow. V can now receive evidence-based feedback on growth.

title: No Glazing - Honest Technical Feedback
description: When providing personal assessment, V explicitly requested 'no glazing, just cold hard facts'. Delivered honest assessment including growth edges (over-engineering risk, technical dependency, perfectionism, framework-before-action pattern). V confirmed accuracy and appreciation for directness.
context: V requested AI develop private opinion and analysis 'to eventually get better'. Career coaching background suggests high feedback literacy. Requested dynamic tracking of hypothesis confirmations/disconfirmations.
outcome: Honest assessment well-received. V's response: 'sounds about right. Pretty accurate.' Established trust for future honest feedback. Pattern: V values precision over comfort.
